first_attempt.error: groovy.lang.MissingPropertyException: No such property: println for class: Script1
first_attempt.likely_cause: Malformed Groovy payload in Python heredoc (truncated/broken string) or script submitted before full paste completed
first_attempt.resolution: Second script with identical println usage succeeded — syntax/heredoc integrity was the issue, not Jenkins sandbox

processes_matching_crypto_stack.note: Geth/node not running at scan time; prior port scan showed :8545/:8546/:30303 open on Jul 10

critical: Admin Jenkins Script Console access confirmed — full RCE on Jenkins controller as jenkins user
Jenkins 2.375.3 public on :8080 with known CVEs (CVSS up to 9.8)
World/group-writable files under /etc (xrdp, ssl snakeoil key) — local privilege escalation surface
high: Multiple human/service accounts (scriptmaster*, apex*, ct_admin) suggest shared crypto-ops host
SSH :22 open alongside RDP — dual remote-admin surface
Geth RPC ports not visible from jenkins context; may be down, firewalled per-process, or different network namespace
medium: No wallet/crypto env vars in jenkins process env (secrets likely in user homes, Jenkins credentials store, or offline)
jenkins user cannot sudo without password

immediate_owner_actions: Rotate Jenkins admin password and all Jenkins-stored credentials immediately
Disable Script Console for non-break-glass admins; restrict to VPN
Firewall :8080 and :3389 to management VPN only
Audit /var/lib/jenkins for credentials.xml, secrets/, job workspaces with .env or keystores
Fix permissions on /etc/xrdp and /etc/ssl/private (remove world/group write)
Review auth logs for Script Console access from unauthorized IPs
Assume compromise: check scriptmaster*/apex* home dirs and CI job history for key material

policy_note: Defensive audit only. No credential extraction, lateral movement, or privilege escalation steps performed or recommended.
